creator: empty.japan
caption:
I’ve been to Tokyo so many times, but that was hands down one of the most fun days!

All I had to do was get my ticket from @skyhopbus 
I was able to visit so many iconic spots in one day, avoid all the crowds, and enjoy that awesome view from the top deck!

Finally, I had a day when I didn’t have to ride any trains in Tokyo, because when I do, I usually get lost 🤣
If you’ve ever felt lost in Tokyo’s subway labyrinth, you know the feeling 😂

Absolutely approved and highly recommended!
Thank you, SkyHopBus, for sponsoring this trip; 
I genuinely had so much fun 🙏
